title: Run live TUI launch QA through tmux
prompt: Run the real TUI launch QA phase through tmux and verify that startup, help, autocomplete, prompt entry, cancellation, permission chrome, and exit all leave visible evidence.

args: const fs=require('node:fs'); const manifest=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('.omo/evidence/kimi-agent-bench/system-suite/tui-launch-tmux/manifest.json','utf8')); const summary=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('.omo/evidence/kimi-agent-bench/system-suite/tui-launch-tmux/tui/summary.json','utf8')); if (manifest.status !== 'tui-launch-pass') throw new Error(`manifest status ${manifest.status}`); if (summary.status !== 'PASS') throw new Error(`tui summary status ${summary.status}`); const required=['startup','help','clear','autocomplete','prompt-entry','escape-cancel','permission-mode','exit']; for (const name of required) { const capture=summary.captures?.find((entry)=>entry.scenario===name); if (capture?.status !== 'PASS') throw new Error(`missing passing capture ${name}`); }
